name: jt_site
description: JetThoughts Hugo site with comprehensive build validation and zero-defect configuration

scripts.test:performance: bun run build && lighthouse http://localhost:8080 --output json --output-path ./lighthouse-results/report.json

mcpServers.description: MCP servers available to agents on this project. No API keys, tokens, or secrets — values here are server names and tool names only.

chrome-devtools.purpose: Browser automation — screenshot capture, UI testing, visual regression

context7.purpose: Framework documentation — official API references, feature specs, integration patterns

github.purpose: Repository coordination — PR management, issue tracking, repo analysis

brave-search.purpose: Web search — technology best practices, emerging patterns

searxng.purpose: Web research — self-hosted metasearch, current best practices, community solutions

package-search.purpose: Package and dependency research — find and analyze npm/Ruby/Go packages before install

semble.purpose: Semantic code search — natural-language queries with nearest-neighbor expansion

deepwiki.purpose: Repository documentation — AI-powered wiki for GitHub repos; ask structural questions about any codebase

claude-in-chrome.purpose: Browser automation — full Chrome control for UI testing, visual verification, cover image rendering

stitch.purpose: Design generation — screen creation, design system application, cover image prototyping via Stitch MCP

lean-ctx.purpose: Context runtime — compressed file reads, shell commands, semantic search with ~95% token reduction

grepai.purpose: Semantic code search with call-graph tracing — find callers, callees, and related code across the repo

memory.purpose: Cross-session entity graph — persist named concepts, relationships, and observations across agent runs
